item.title: Sears Leaks 1M AI Chats: 3 Privacy Lessons from Retail's Fiasco and Invisalign's 3D Boom
item.description: Fear retail bot leaks like Sears' data breach? Learn 3 privacy lessons vs. Invisalign's AI 3D printing win. AI shakes consumer worlds—for better or worse.

item.title: AI's Accessibility Boom: Teen Chaos, Coding Clashes, and Quiet Pivots
item.description: Ever wonder what happens when cutting-edge AI lands in the hands of bored teenagers? From viral teacher roasts to OpenAI's frantic coding upgrades and Nick Clegg's grounded new venture, we're diving into the messy, exciting world of democratized tech—and what it spells for tomorrow.
